title: MISHKAN Research Log Entry
description: Contract produced by any agent invoking the research pipeline (design §14).

query_intent.description: What the agent was trying to find out

tools_invoked.description: Pipeline agents/tools used (Jakin, Ezra, Caleb, Shaphan, Shemaiah, Baruch)

research_output_summary.description: Compressed result. Full output lives in Cognee.

curated_library_match.description: True if solved via curated library, not web pipeline

cognee_node_id.description: ID of the written Cognee node, if any

curated_promotion_candidate.description: D-016: set by Baruch when the run resolved a reusable, cross-project resource that the curated library does not yet cover, nominating it for engineer-gated promotion (`mishkan knowledge curate`). null/absent on every other run. Setting this writes NOTHING to curated — it only queues a candidate for human review.

url.description: Canonical URL — also the dedup key

problem_class.description: The class of problem it solves (matches CuratedResource.problem_class)

team.description: The team whose problem space it serves

source_tier.description: Provenance quality of the resource (e.g. primary, official-docs, vendor)

why.description: One line: why this is reusable beyond the current project
